meanings.cc.can.giap: Giáp, the yang Wood stem, signals bold pioneering drive and upright growth like a great tree reaching for the light.
meanings.cc.can.at: Ất, the yin Wood stem, suggests gentle adaptability and quiet persistence, bending like a vine yet never breaking.
meanings.cc.can.binh: Bính, the yang Fire stem, blazes with radiant warmth, charisma and an open, generous spirit.
meanings.cc.can.dinh: Đinh, the yin Fire stem, glows with the steady, intimate light of a lamp, marking refined insight and devotion.
meanings.cc.can.mau: Mậu, the yang Earth stem, stands solid and dependable as a mountain, offering stability and steadfast resolve.
meanings.cc.can.ky: Kỷ, the yin Earth stem, nurtures like fertile soil, favouring patience, care and quiet cultivation.
meanings.cc.can.canh: Canh, the yang Metal stem, carries the keen strength of forged iron, denoting decisiveness, justice and resolve.
meanings.cc.can.tan: Tân, the yin Metal stem, shines like a polished jewel, marking elegance, discernment and a love of fine things.
meanings.cc.can.nham: Nhâm, the yang Water stem, flows with the depth and ambition of a great river, embracing change and far horizons.
meanings.cc.can.quy: Quý, the yin Water stem, moves like gentle rain or mist, suggesting intuition, sensitivity and quiet wisdom.
meanings.cc.chi.ty: Tý, the Rat, embodies quick wit, resourcefulness and shrewd opportunism.
meanings.cc.chi.suu: Sửu, the Ox, signifies patient endurance, diligence and unshakeable reliability.
meanings.cc.chi.dan: Dần, the Tiger, conveys courage, dynamic energy and a commanding, fearless presence.
meanings.cc.chi.mao: Mão, the Cat, suggests gentleness, tact and a refined love of comfort and harmony.
meanings.cc.chi.thin: Thìn, the Dragon, radiates power, ambition and an auspicious, larger-than-life vitality.
meanings.cc.chi.ti: Tỵ, the Snake, denotes deep wisdom, subtlety and quietly enigmatic intuition.
meanings.cc.chi.ngo: Ngọ, the Horse, gallops with freedom, enthusiasm and restless adventurous spirit.
meanings.cc.chi.mui: Mùi, the Goat, reflects tenderness, creativity and a peace-loving, compassionate nature.
meanings.cc.chi.than: Thân, the Monkey, sparkles with cleverness, versatility and playful ingenuity.
meanings.cc.chi.dau: Dậu, the Rooster, marks precision, confidence and a candid, meticulous eye for detail.
meanings.cc.chi.tuat: Tuất, the Dog, stands for loyalty, honesty and a protective sense of justice.
meanings.cc.chi.hoi: Hợi, the Pig, embodies sincerity, generosity and an easy-going, good-natured warmth.
